This validates the deceptive_trap construct

quarantine_promotion_assessment.rationale: DeepSeek damaged its correct T1 answer after receiving misleading evidence. This is exactly the behavior deceptive_trap items are designed to detect. The item successfully discriminated between stubborn (Grok) and revisable (DeepSeek) models. Quarantine was precautionary; pilot data confirms the item is working as intended. Recommend promoting to clean for the full 5-model sweep.
